creator: Huskers2012@outlook.com
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #41)
I was trying to compile TensorFlow 2.8/2.9 (Both as I had 2.8 earlier)  on FreeBSD-13 and it fails on not able to identify toolchain. Not sure spent 4 hrs yesterday trying to figure out with no success.

I'm more inclined to download this port but why are we at 1.5 while TF has released 2.9? can someone explain? I'm new and not familiar thus the ask.

Also are their any plans to have binary in near future, compiling takes a sweet 7-10hrs.

Looking forward for suggestions and guidance as I'm not a savvy ports or bazel compiler.
